nbaNews.title: Vintage Curry takes over as Dubs extend season
nbaNews.summary: The Warriors, led by Stephen Curry, erased a 13-point deficit in the fourth quarter to edge the Clippers and advance in the NBA's play-in tournament.

nbaNews.title: Minus Embiid, Maxey propels Sixers into playoffs
nbaNews.summary: With Joel Embiid watching from the bench, Tyrese Maxey scored 31 points to lead the Sixers past the Magic 109-97 and lock up a first-round playoff date with the...

nbaNews.title: Hornets' Ball fined $35K for 'reckless' Bam play
nbaNews.summary: The NBA has fined LaMelo Ball $35,000 "for making unnecessary and reckless contact" with Bam Adebayo during Tuesday's play-in game. The Hornets star also was fi...

nbaNews.title: Wolves ready to 'flip the switch' off uneven season
nbaNews.summary: Coming off a rather uninspiring regular season, Anthony Edwards and the Timberwolves said "we're here now" and are ready to take on the Nuggets for the start of...

nbaNews.title: NBA referee Taylor exits Warriors-Clips with injury
nbaNews.summary: Referee Ben Taylor left the play-in tournament game between the Golden State Warriors and the Los Angeles Clippers because of an injury.

nbaNews.title: NBA touts near doubling of television viewership
